TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_BIAS_POWER.title: Tune Strain · Bias
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_BIAS_POWER.descri: Cleared and converted into an equal amount of [gold]Tune Strain · Interference[/gold] when Resonance Break resolves.
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_BIAS_POWER.smartD: Cleared and converted into an equal amount of Tune Strain · Interference when Resonance Break resolves.
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_INTERFERENCE_POWE: Direct attack damage taken is amplified by the Tune Strain vulnerability ratio.
Direct attack damage taken is amplified by the Tune Strain vulnerability ratio.
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_RESPONSE_POWER.de: When a Tune Strain rupture resolves, the count of [gold]Tune Strain Response[/gold] cards in your draw pile, hand, and discard pile overwrites this power's stacks; while active, you deal extra damage to enemies with [gold]Tune Strain · Interference[/gold].
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_RESPONSE_POWER.sm: When a Tune Strain rupture resolves, response card count overwrites stacks; while active, you deal extra damage to enemies with Tune Strain · Interference.
